1.name: 0393 CEA-BST Rai14 Pdyn Crh Gaba_2
1.rationale: The label explicitly encodes all three critical properties: BST (bed nuclei of stria terminalis = BNST), Crh (the defining marker of bnst_crf_neuron), and Gaba (GABAergic NT — consistent with BNST CRF neurons). CEA-BST lineage places this in the central amygdala/BNST GABAergic compartment, which is precisely the expected parent clade. This is the only rank-1 candidate with both correct region and correct marker in its label. Top recommendation for mapping.

1.name: 0410 BST Tac2 Gaba_2
1.rationale: BST (BNST)-located GABAergic supertype — correct region and NT type. Defined by Tac2 (tachykinin 2) rather than Crh, so the defining marker does not match. May represent a neighboring BNST GABAergic subtype or a supertype that partially overlaps with the Crh+ population. Worth checking whether clusters under this supertype co-express Crh.

1.name: 0397 SI-MPO-LPO Lhx8 Gaba_2
1.rationale: GABAergic supertype spanning substantia innominata, medial preoptic area, and lateral preoptic area. Lhx8 marks ventral forebrain GABAergic lineage. Location does not include BNST. Score=1 likely reflects marker hit only. Not a credible match for dlBNST CRF neurons.

1.name: 0214 Sst Gaba_1
1.rationale: Cortical/subcortical Sst-expressing GABAergic supertype. Correct NT type but wrong region — neocortical Sst interneurons are not BNST. Score=1 reflects incidental marker hit.

1.name: 0225 Sst Gaba_12
1.rationale: Cortical Sst GABAergic supertype. Same reasoning as SUPT_0214 — wrong region.

1.name: 0672 MG-POL-SGN Nts Glut_1
1.rationale: Glutamatergic supertype in medial geniculate/posterior thalamus. Wrong NT type (Glut vs expected GABA) and entirely wrong brain region (thalamus vs BNST). Should not be considered.

non_candidates_summary: No rank-0 cluster candidates are credible for bnst_crf_neuron. The DB query returned 30 clusters all at score=1, indicating only partial matching (marker OR location, not both). All Glut clusters (brainstem, cortex, parabrachial, hindbrain) are EXCLUDED — wrong NT type and wrong region. GABAergic cortical interneuron clusters (Vip, Sst, Lamp5 lineages) are WEAK — they may share incidental marker expression but have no BNST location. The Calb1 negative marker exclusion rule could not be applied at rank-0 based on cluster labels alone (Calb1 does not appear in any cluster label in this candidate set), but all rank-0 candidates are discarded on region grounds regardless. At rank-1, CS20230722_SUPT_0393 (CEA-BST Rai14 Pdyn Crh Gaba_2) is the single STRONG candidate — the only entry with BST location, Crh marker, and GABAergic NT all encoded in the supertype label. Recommend mapping hypothesis at rank-1 with SUPT_0393 as primary target and SUPT_0410 (BST Tac2 Gaba_2) as secondary/co-mapping check.
